tool_args.label: NYPD reports MTA crime statistics
tool_args.raw_text: Police Department City of New York MTA Report

payload.description: NYPD prepared the MTA crime statistics report

evidence_refs.source_quote: Police Department City of New York

payload.description: The crime statistics report was prepared for the MTA

payload.claim_text: Total major felonies on the MTA transit system decreased 18.1% in January-March 2025 compared to January-March 2024, from 568 to 465.
Total arrests on the MTA transit system increased 71.1% in March 2025 compared to March 2024, from 1,691 to 2,893.

tool_args.label: TOS Arrests more than doubled in March 2025

payload.claim_text: TOS arrests on the MTA transit system increased 105.2% in March 2025 compared to March 2024, more than doubling from 654 to 1,342.

tool_args.label: Jan-Mar 2025 total major felonies lowest since 1997

payload.claim_text: The 465 total major felonies on the MTA transit system in January-March 2025 is the lowest Q1 figure in the 1997-2025 historical series.
